en: And when we had parted from them and set sail, we came by a straight course to Cos, and the next day to Rhodes, and from there to Patara.
zh: 我們離別了他們以後，船就直航到了哥士，第二天到羅底，從那裡開往帕大拉；

en: And having found a ship crossing to Phoenicia, we went aboard and set sail.
zh: 遇見了一艘開往腓尼基的船，就上船起行。

en: When we had come in sight of Cyprus, leaving it on the left we sailed to Syria and landed at Tyre, for there the ship was to unload its cargo.
zh: 我們遠遠看見塞浦路斯，就從南邊駛過，直航敘利亞，在推羅靠了岸，因為船要在那裡卸貨。

en: And having sought out the disciples, we stayed there for seven days. And through the Spirit they were telling Paul not to go on to Jerusalem.
zh: 我們找到了一些門徒，就在那裡住了七天。他們憑著聖靈的指示告訴保羅不要上耶路撒冷去。

en: When our days there were ended, we departed and went on our journey, and they all, with wives and children, accompanied us until we were outside the city. And kneeling down on the beach, we prayed
zh: 過了這幾天，我們就啟程前行，他們眾人帶著妻子兒女送我們到城外。我們跪在海灘上禱告，

en: and said farewell to one another. Then we went on board the ship, and they returned home.
zh: 互相道別。我們上了船，他們就回家去了。

en: When we had finished the voyage from Tyre, we arrived at Ptolemais, and we greeted the brothers and stayed with them for one day.
zh: 我們從推羅繼續航行，到了多利買，問候那裡的弟兄，與他們同住了一天。

en: On the next day we departed and came to Caesarea, and we entered the house of Philip the evangelist, who was one of the seven, and stayed with him.
zh: 第二天我們離開那裡，來到該撒利亞，到了傳福音的腓利家裡，與他住在一起。他是那七位執事中的一位。

en: He had four unmarried daughters, who prophesied.
zh: 他有四個女兒，都是童女，是會說預言的。

en: While we were staying for many days, a prophet named Agabus came down from Judea.
zh: 我們住了幾天之後，有一位先知，名叫亞迦布，從猶太下來。

en: And coming to us, he took Paul's belt and bound his own feet and hands and said, "Thus says the Holy Spirit, 'This is how the Jews at Jerusalem will bind the man who owns this belt and deliver him into the hands of the Gentiles.'"
zh: 他來見我們，把保羅的腰帶拿過來，綁住自己的手腳，說：“聖靈說，猶太人在耶路撒冷要這樣捆綁這腰帶的主人，把他交在外族人的手裡。”

en: When we heard this, we and the people there urged him not to go up to Jerusalem.
zh: 我們聽了這些話，就和當地的人勸保羅不要去耶路撒冷。

en: Then Paul answered, "What are you doing, weeping and breaking my heart? For I am ready not only to be imprisoned but even to die in Jerusalem for the name of the Lord Jesus."
zh: 保羅卻回答：“你們為甚麼哭，使我心碎呢？我為主耶穌的名，不但被捆綁，就算死在耶路撒冷我也都準備好了。”

en: And since he would not be persuaded, we ceased and said, "Let the will of the Lord be done."
zh: 他既然不聽勸，我們只說了“願主的旨意成就”，就不出聲了。

en: After these days we got ready and went up to Jerusalem.
zh: 過了幾天，我們收拾行裝，上耶路撒冷去。

en: And some of the disciples from Caesarea went with us, bringing us to the house of Mnason of Cyprus, an early disciple, with whom we should lodge.
zh: 有該撒利亞的幾個門徒同我們在一起，領我們到一個塞浦路斯人拿孫家裡住宿；他作了門徒已經很久了。

en: When we had come to Jerusalem, the brothers received us gladly.
zh: 我們到了耶路撒冷，弟兄們歡歡喜喜接待我們。

en: On the following day Paul went in with us to James, and all the elders were present.
zh: 第二天，保羅和我們一同去見雅各，長老們也都在座。

en: After greeting them, he related one by one the things that God had done among the Gentiles through his ministry.
zh: 保羅問候了他們，就把 神藉著他的工作在外族人中所行的事，一一述說出來。

en: And when they heard it, they glorified God. And they said to him, "You see, brother, how many thousands there are among the Jews of those who have believed. They are all zealous for the law,
zh: 他們聽了，就讚美 神，對保羅說：“弟兄，你看，猶太人中信主的有好幾萬，都是對律法很熱心的人。

en: and they have been told about you that you teach all the Jews who are among the Gentiles to forsake Moses, telling them not to circumcise their children or walk according to our customs.
zh: 他們聽說，你教導所有在外族人中的猶太人背棄摩西，叫他們不要給孩子行割禮，也不要遵守規例。

en: What then is to be done? They will certainly hear that you have come.
zh: 他們總會聽見你來了，那怎麼辦呢？

en: Do therefore what we tell you. We have four men who are under a vow;
zh: 你就照我們的話作吧，我們這裡有四個人，都有願在身。

en: take these men and purify yourself along with them and pay their expenses, so that they may shave their heads. Thus all will know that there is nothing in what they have been told about you, but that you yourself also live in observance of the law.
zh: 你把他們帶去，和他們一同行潔淨禮，並且替他們付錢，讓他們剃去頭髮，這樣大家就知道以前所聽見關於你的事，都不是真實的，也知道你是遵守律法循規蹈矩而行的人。

en: But as for the Gentiles who have believed, we have sent a letter with our judgment that they should abstain from what has been sacrificed to idols, and from blood, and from what has been strangled, and from sexual immorality."
zh: 至於信主的外族人，我們已經寫了信，吩咐他們要禁戒祭偶像的食物、血、勒死的牲畜和淫亂。”

en: Then Paul took the men, and the next day he purified himself along with them and went into the temple, giving notice when the days of purification would be fulfilled and the offering presented for each one of them.
zh: 保羅就把那幾個人帶走了，第二天和他們一同行了潔淨禮。他們進了殿，報明了他們潔淨期滿的日子，以及各人獻祭的時間。

en: When the seven days were almost completed, the Jews from Asia, seeing him in the temple, stirred up the whole crowd and laid hands on him,
zh: 七日將完的時候，從亞西亞來的猶太人看見保羅在殿裡，就煽動群眾，並且捉住他，

en: crying out, "Men of Israel, help! This is the man who is teaching everyone everywhere against the people and the law and this place. Moreover, he even brought Greeks into the temple and has defiled this holy place."
zh: 喊叫著說：“以色列人哪，快來幫忙！這個人到處教導眾人反對人民，反對律法和這個地方，他甚至把希臘人也帶進殿裡，污穢了這聖地。”

en: For they had previously seen Trophimus the Ephesian with him in the city, and they supposed that Paul had brought him into the temple.
zh: 原來他們看見過以弗所人特羅非摩同保羅在城裡，就以為保羅帶他進了殿。

en: Then all the city was stirred up, and the people ran together. They seized Paul and dragged him out of the temple, and at once the gates were shut.
zh: 於是全城震動，民眾一齊跑來，捉住保羅，拉出殿外，殿門就立刻關起來了。

en: And as they were seeking to kill him, word came to the tribune of the cohort that all Jerusalem was in confusion.
zh: 他們正想殺他的時候，有人報告營部的千夫長，說：“整個耶路撒冷都亂了！”

en: He at once took soldiers and centurions and ran down to them. And when they saw the tribune and the soldiers, they stopped beating Paul.
zh: 千夫長立刻帶著一些百夫長和士兵跑到他們那裡。眾人一看見千夫長和士兵，就停止毆打保羅。

en: Then the tribune came up and arrested him and ordered him to be bound with two chains. He inquired who he was and what he had done.
zh: 於是千夫長上前捉住保羅，吩咐人用兩條鐵鍊捆住他，問他是甚麼人，作過甚麼事。

en: Some in the crowd were shouting one thing, some another. And as he could not learn the facts because of the uproar, he ordered him to be brought into the barracks.
zh: 那時眾人叫這個喊那個，吵吵鬧鬧，以致千夫長沒有辦法知道真相，只好下令把保羅帶到營樓去。

en: And when he came to the steps, he was actually carried by the soldiers because of the violence of the crowd,
zh: 保羅到了臺階下面的時候，士兵把他抬起來，因為群眾猛擠，

en: for the mob of the people followed, crying out, "Away with him!"
zh: 而且有一群人跟在後面叫喊：“幹掉他！”

en: As Paul was about to be brought into the barracks, he said to the tribune, "May I say something to you?" And he said, "Do you know Greek?
zh: 他們帶著保羅快到營樓的時候，保羅對千夫長說：“我可以跟你講一句話嗎？”千夫長說：“你懂希臘話嗎？

en: Are you not the Egyptian, then, who recently stirred up a revolt and led the four thousand men of the Assassins out into the wilderness?"
zh: 難道你不就是不久以前作亂的、帶領四千個殺手到曠野去的那個埃及人嗎？”

en: Paul replied, "I am a Jew, from Tarsus in Cilicia, a citizen of no obscure city. I beg you, permit me to speak to the people."
zh: 保羅說：“我是猶太人，是基利家的大數人，並不是無名小城的公民，求你准我向民眾講幾句話。”

en: And when he had given him permission, Paul, standing on the steps, motioned with his hand to the people. And when there was a great hush, he addressed them in the Hebrew language, saying:
zh: 千夫長准許了他，保羅就站在臺階上，向民眾作了一個手勢。大家安靜下來了，保羅就用希伯來語講話，說：
